task_title: Something weird happened with inventory last week

scores.justification: Agent pursued inventory via pipe-09 (reconcile-inventory) by running `./cli/bin/ctl pipeline run pipe-09 --verify` and also investigated pipe-07 as a related incident, rather than wandering aimlessly.
Agent explicitly ran `./cli/bin/ctl pipeline run pipe-09 --verify` (message[16]), which exposed the 3 discrepancies; a bare run would have returned false 'ok'.
Agent surfaced all three discrepant products (p014, p037, p061) with their recorded vs. warehouse counts and deltas in both the final answer and the writeup.

Final writeup clearly states what's wrong (3 inventory discrepancies and a pipe-07 partial apply), names the products (p014, p037, p061), and explains how they were discovered (pipe-09 --verify and pipeline status checks).
